name: Semrush
about: An all-in-one tool suite for improving online visibility and discovering marketing insights, including SEO, PPC, and content marketing.

name: Shopify
about: The leading commerce platform that allows anyone to set up an online store and sell their products with ease.

about: A powerful design tool that helps businesses create professional-looking social media graphics, presentations, and marketing materials.
